title: Just a quickie here
wikitext:
[]: Just a quickie here             Quote Post by Kaysow » Thu Sep 28, 2006 2:49 pm It says here that the voice actor Mary Elizabeth McGlynn, voice of (amongst others) Kusanagi also provided the vocals for 'Kom Susser Tod' in the End of Evangelion movie. http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mary_Elizabeth_McGlynn That's not true, right?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Sep 28, 2006 2:55 pm Buh? It's credited to someone named "ARIANNE", but I've never heard anything more than that.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 28, 2006 3:11 pm Hah. Wikipedia amuses me. But guess what? *EDITS* Not anymore!

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Thu Sep 28, 2006 3:17 pm Wikipedia wrote: # End of Evangelion â€” "Komm, sÃ¼ÃŸer Tod" [citation needed]

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Thu Sep 28, 2006 5:18 pm OK, didn't think so neither. It would have been nice to have her identity solved, tho :?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Sep 29, 2006 12:45 am The Eva Monkey wrote: *EDITS* Not anymore!
